allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "--- gradle cmd?"; \(Get-Command gradle -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse "app\\src\\main" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'assets' } | Select-Object FullName; Write-Output "---catalog?"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse "app\\src\\main" -Filter "catalog.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; g={}; [g.setdefault\(re.match\(r'^\([A-Za-z]+\\d+?\)\(\\d\)\\.',i['filename']\).group\(1\),{}\).__setitem__\(int\(re.match\(r'^\([A-Za-z]+\\d+?\)\(\\d\)\\.',i['filename']\).group\(2\)\), i['filename']\) for i in d if re.match\(r'^\([A-Za-z]+\\d+?\)\(\\d\)\\.',i['filename']\)]; print\('groups:', len\(g\)\); [print\(k, sorted\(v.items\(\)\)\) for k,v in list\(g.items\(\)\)[:4]]")
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "---gradle---"; \(Get-Command gradle -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)
